info.name: CryptoCompare min-api (Legacy)
info.description:
The CryptoCompare min-api (now CoinDesk Data Legacy API) provides cryptocurrency market data including current and historical prices, OHLCV candles (minute/hour/day), top lists by volume and market cap, news, social statistics, order book data, blockchain data, and exchange information. The REST API is available at https://min-api.cryptocompare.com/data and supports authenticated access via an API key passed either as the api_key query parameter or in the Authorization header. Free-tier traffic is metered in monthly call credits; paid commercial tiers expand the monthly budget and enable additional endpoints such as news, social, blockchain, top lists, and order book.

Contact Support:
 Name: CryptoCompare / CoinDesk Data Support
 Email: data@cryptocompare.com

query.description: (Required) From-symbol (base cryptocurrency symbol), e.g. BTC.
(Required) Comma-separated to-symbols (target currencies), e.g. USD,EUR.
Source exchange (default CCCAGG aggregate index).
When false, do not multi-hop convert via BTC if a direct pair is unavailable.

request.description: Returns the latest aggregated price for a single source cryptocurrency converted into one or more target currencies. Uses CCCAGG by default.

response.name: Mapping of target symbol to current price.
